findings.title: Math.min(...chunksPerSegment, 0) always returns 0 — FIXED: uses reduce-based min/max
findings.resolution: Replaced Math.min/max spread with reduce-based approach for both chunksPerSegment and lengths arrays

findings.title: Math.min/max(...lengths) stack overflow on large collections — FIXED: uses reduce
findings.resolution: Replaced with lengths.reduce((a, b) => Math.min(a, b), Infinity) pattern

findings.title: sourceTypeCoverage is now a ratio (AC-US7-06) — FIXED
findings.resolution: Added collectionSourceTypes computation from segments, divides allTraceSourceTypes.size by total

findings.title: Document catalog check implemented (AC-US6-04) — FIXED
findings.resolution: Added catalog loading, chunk ID cross-reference, and orphan reporting

findings.title: --skip-llm now includes themes stage — FIXED
findings.resolution: Added 'themes' to the skip-llm stage check alongside edges and search

findings.title: Relative import paths replaced with package exports — FIXED
findings.resolution: All evaluator imports now use @wtfoc/ingest, @wtfoc/search, @wtfoc/store package entry points

findings.title: evaluateThemes signature missing embedder and extractorOptions params
findings.description: Intentional simplification for initial implementation — cohesion and LLM labeling are documented follow-ups

findings.title: Intra-cluster cohesion metric not computed (AC-US8-02)
findings.description: Acceptable as follow-up given the missing embedder param. Documented gap.
